events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"high","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","degraded"],"percent_complete":70,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.8,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Low suction pressure with high superheat and normal-to-low subcooling indicates undercharge or TXV starving rather than dirty coil","Gauge readout classic FD triple not resolved; system operating outside mfr charging chart tolerance"],"actions":["Verify actual refrigerant charge against mfr charging charts","Check subcooling/superheat to differentiate low charge vs TXV starving","Inspect/confirm coil cleanliness and airflow before adjusting charge"],"rationale":"Gauge interpretation shows low suction/high superheat inconsistent with dirty coil; charge/diagnostic not within OEM tolerance at rough-complete stage","references":["mfr charging charts"]}
